mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement(announcementno, adminno, title, content, rdate, cnt) VALUES(announce_seq.nextval, #{adminno}, #{title}, #{content}, sysdate, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT announcementno, adminno, title, content, rdate, cnt FROM announcement ORDER BY announcementno DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE announcement SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, rdate=sysdate WHERE announcementno = #{announcementno}
